data.body: PREPLANNING_CONTEXT: {"version":1,"epicId":"3818-310d","generatedAt":"2026-04-20T07:42:53Z","generatedBy":"preplanning","epic":{"title":"Polyglot Lint & Format Gates: stack-agnostic lint/format config and gate scripts","description":"The existing lint/format gates are Python-specific. This epic adds commands.lint, commands.format, and commands.format_check keys to make the gate pipeline stack-agnostic.","successCriteria":["auto-format.sh reads commands.format; emits [DSO WARN] when absent with exit 0; when present, invokes configured formatter on staged files","validate.sh reads commands.lint (new key alongside existing); reads new key first, falls back to legacy; emits [DSO WARN] and skips when both absent","gate-2d and gate-2b read commands.format_check; emit [DSO WARN] and skip when absent","Onboarding writes stack-specific defaults for Python, Node/JS, Ruby","Re-onboarding preserves existing values (key-presence-based); emits [DSO INFO] per preserved key","Validation: run onboarding on a Ruby project; validate.sh runs bundle exec rubocop instead of ruff"]},"stories":[{"id":"8657-e8cc","title":"As a developer, validate.sh reads commands.lint to run stack-appropriate linting","description":"Modify validate.sh to read commands.lint; fall back to legacy commands.lint_ruff/commands.lint_mypy; WARN+skip when both absent","priority":1,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":true,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["When complete, validate.sh with commands.lint=bundle exec rubocop runs rubocop","When complete, validate.sh with no commands.lint but legacy set runs ruff (fallback)","When complete, validate.sh with neither key emits [DSO WARN] and exits 0","Unit tests passing covering all three states"],"considerations":["[Reliability] Legacy fallback chain must not break Python-only projects on upgrade","[Testing] Three-state test: key present, key absent + legacy, both absent","[Conflicting Assumptions] When both commands.lint AND legacy keys present, commands.lint wins with [DSO INFO]"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":[],"satisfiesCriterion":"validate.sh reads commands.lint; reads new key first, falls back to legacy; emits [DSO WARN] and skips when both absent"},{"id":"5278-dfae","title":"As a developer, hooks/auto-format.sh reads commands.format to run stack-appropriate formatting on staged files","description":"Modify auto-format.sh to read commands.format; invoke when present; preserve legacy ruff for .py when absent","priority":1,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":false,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["When complete, auto-format.sh with commands.format=prettier --write invokes prettier","When complete, auto-format.sh with no commands.format emits [DSO WARN] and exits 0 (non-Python)","When complete, auto-format.sh on Python-only project with no commands.format continues to invoke ruff (legacy preserved)","Unit tests passing covering three states"],"considerations":["[Consumer Impact] CLAUDE.md PostToolUse hook auto-formats .py via ruff \u2014 must preserve legacy when commands.format absent","[Reliability] Python-only projects must not require re-onboarding after upgrade","[Testing] Three-state test"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":[],"satisfiesCriterion":"auto-format.sh reads commands.format; emits [DSO WARN] when absent with exit 0; when present, invokes configured formatter on staged files"},{"id":"5b0c-7928","title":"As a developer, gate-2d and gate-2b read commands.format_check and skip gracefully when absent","description":"Modify gate-2d and gate-2b to read commands.format_check; WARN+skip when absent","priority":1,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":false,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["When complete, both gates with commands.format_check=prettier --check invoke prettier --check","When complete, both gates with no key emit [DSO WARN] and exit 0","Unit tests passing"],"considerations":["[Maintainability] Consistent WARN+skip pattern in both scripts","[Residual References] Grep for other callers before modifying; see S6 for audit scope"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":[],"satisfiesCriterion":"gate-2d and gate-2b read commands.format_check; emit [DSO WARN] and skip when absent"},{"id":"efe0-69c3","title":"As a developer, all gate and validate scripts that hardcode ruff or format-check read commands.lint/format_check instead","description":"Audit and update scripts beyond auto-format.sh/validate.sh/gate-2b/gate-2d that hardcode ruff/format-check","priority":2,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":false,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["When complete, grep returns no unconditional ruff/prettier --check calls outside named scripts","When complete, any discovered scripts read commands.lint/format_check or are documented as intentionally Python-only","Unit tests passing for any modified scripts"],"considerations":["[Residual References] validate-phase.sh, merge-to-main.sh, smoke-test-portable.sh are candidates \u2014 confirm via grep"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":[],"satisfiesCriterion":"Epic goal: stack-agnostic gate pipeline"},{"id":"be33-23e0","title":"As a project operator, onboarding writes stack-specific defaults for commands.lint, commands.format, and commands.format_check","description":"Update onboarding SKILL.md to write per-stack defaults; key-presence preservation; Epic A ordering","priority":2,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":false,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["When complete, Ruby onboarding sets rubocop defaults for all three keys","When complete, Node/JS onboarding sets eslint/prettier defaults","When complete, re-onboarding skips existing keys with [DSO INFO]","When complete, step ordering puts commands.test_runner before commands.lint/format/format_check","Unit tests passing"],"considerations":["[Reliability] Epic A (87e9-0bc8) must land before this story can complete (write ordering)","[Testing] Empty-string key must be treated as not-set","[Conflicting Assumptions] Multi-stack repos follow Epic A patterns"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["8657-e8cc","5278-dfae","5b0c-7928","87e9-0bc8"],"satisfiesCriterion":"Onboarding writes stack-specific defaults; Re-onboarding preserves existing values"},{"id":"dd2d-708d","title":"Update project docs to reflect polyglot lint/format gates","description":"Update CLAUDE.md and CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md for the three new config keys","priority":3,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":false,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["When complete, CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md has entries for commands.lint, commands.format, commands.format_check","When complete, CLAUDE.md accurately describes the stack-agnostic gate pipeline"],"considerations":["Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["8657-e8cc","5278-dfae","5b0c-7928","be33-23e0","efe0-69c3"],"satisfiesCriterion":"Epic validation: polyglot gate pipeline is observable and documented"}],"storyDashboard":{"totalStories":6,"uiStories":0,"criticalPath":["8657-e8cc","5278-dfae","5b0c-7928","efe0-69c3","be33-23e0","dd2d-708d"]}}
